fixes.title: AST Node ID Mismatch
fixes.problem: DependencyGraphBuilder generated node IDs that did not match ASTParserService node IDs, causing 'Node {node_id} not found in AST index' errors
fixes.root_cause: GraphBuilder._generate_node_id() created new IDs with format 'file:name:line' while parsers used 'file::name' format
fixes.solution: Established SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for node IDs in parsers

changes.description: Changed node ID format from 'file::name' to 'file:name:line' for classes and methods
Changed node ID format from 'file::name' to 'file:name:line' for programs, sections, and paragraphs
Modified _add_nodes() and _add_edges() to use ast_node.id directly instead of generating new IDs. Updated _generate_node_id() to return ast_node.id (deprecated but kept for backward compatibility)
Added assertion to verify node_id consistency: 'assert node_id in ast_index'

fixes.impact: TranslationOrchestrator can now successfully look up all nodes in AST index, eliminating pipeline failures

fixes.title: evaluation_report Lifecycle Bug
fixes.problem: PipelineService._phase_7_document() used evaluation_report before initialization, causing NameError
fixes.root_cause: Phase 7 (Documentation) was called with evaluation_report parameter, but evaluation_report was only created in Phase 9 (Evaluation), which runs AFTER Phase 7
fixes.solution: Initialize evaluation_report=None at pipeline start and pass None to DocumentationGenerator

changes.description: Changed _phase_7_document() call to pass evaluation_report=None instead of undefined variable
Already accepts Optional[Dict[str, Any]] for evaluation_report and handles None correctly with 'if evaluation_report:' check
changes.note: No changes needed - already implemented correctly

fixes.impact: Documentation can now be generated successfully even when translation fails or evaluation hasn't run yet

components.file_path: Absolute or relative path to source file
components.node_name: Name of the AST node (class, method, function, etc.)
components.start_line: Line number where the node starts (1-indexed)

node_id_format.uniqueness: Guaranteed unique across files and within files due to file_path + start_line combination
node_id_format.single_source_of_truth: Parsers assign node IDs when AST is created. GraphBuilder and TranslationOrchestrator MUST use these IDs without modification.

pipeline_phase_order.note: Phase order was NOT changed - only fixed lifecycle bug

backward_compatibility.graph_builder_generate_node_id: Kept for backward compatibility but now simply returns ast_node.id. Marked as DEPRECATED in docstring.
backward_compatibility.example_files: Example files in examples/ directory may need updating to use node.id directly instead of builder._generate_node_id(node)
